title: Not Enough Shading
description: A pack that adds shading to every single block in the game.
body:
A resource pack that adds shading to every single block in the game. (grass, doors, cauldrons ect)

#### _See examples in [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/not-enough-shading/gallery)._

---
### • Sodium?
> You can use this resource pack with sodium with no extra mods required.

### • How?
> This pack simply removes all instances of ```"ambientocclusion": false``` from the vanilla block models.

### • Modpacks?
> You may use this resource pack in your modpacks as long as you provide a visible link to this page and dont claim it as your own.

---

Also i currently have no idea how to get shading for signs, so thats an issue i guess.
